svg.title: Paper understanding module internals
svg.desc: Two-stage diagram: PDF parsing layer on top producing raw content, then LLM analysis layer below producing semantic outputs including section roles, concept salience scores, and figure explanations.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What PDF parsing libraries are used?')
sendPrompt('How does the module handle LaTeX math notation in PDFs?')
sendPrompt('How are figures and tables extracted from papers?')
sendPrompt('What is layout analysis and why does it matter?')
sendPrompt('How does section role classification work?')
sendPrompt('How are figures explained and scored for visualizability?')
sendPrompt('What does the paper understanding module output to the next stage?')
